message:
chore(scripts): consolidate ROOT definitions and reorganize imports across 400+ check scripts

Remove duplicate ROOT = Path(...) / ROOT = os.path.dirname(...) definitions
across all check_*.py scripts, consolidating to a single ROOT with
sys.path.insert and configure_test_logging import immediately after. Remove
unused imports (os, re, tempfile, shutil, time) from individual scripts.
Update scripts/lib/test_logger.py to remove unused os import. Reorganize
import ordering in e2e_test_server.py, reproduce.py, rewrite_suggestion_engine.py,
validate_repro_pack.py, and verification scripts so project-local imports
follow sys.path setup. Also update section gate scripts and program
orchestrator with consistent import patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
